channel.title: GameMaps L4D2 Files
channel.description: RSS feed for GameMaps L4D2 Files.

item.title: [ Mod ] Only DOAXVV Marie Rose Whimsical Nyan Maid nht (request)
item.description:
View Article
Media
Media gallery
1 / 8
Only DOAXVV Marie Rose Whimsical Nyan Maid nht (request) DEAD OR ALIVE Xtreme Venus Vacation (2017) Marie Rose - Whimsical Nyan Maid no heart tattoo Skin. Replaces all survivors L4D1(bill,francis,louis,zoey),L4D2 (nick,coach,ellis,rochelle) Skin. Zoey voice support works Credits: skin - iluda306 [DOAXVV Marie Rose - Whimsical Nyan Maid[DL] Rochelle 2] skin edit - l4dkk 9.vpk files are included in the compressed file. DOAXVV Marie Rose WN Maid nht bill.vpk (bill skin) DOAXVV Marie Rose WN Maid nht francis.vpk (francis skin) DOAXVV Marie Rose WN Maid nht Louis.vpk (Louis skin) DOAXVV Marie Rose WN Maid nht Zoey.vpk (zoey skin) DOAXVV Marie Rose WN Maid nht coach.vpk (coach skin) DOAXVV Marie Rose WN Maid nht elliss.vpk (ellis skin) DOAXVV Marie Rose WN Maid nht nick.vpk (nick skin) DOAXVV Marie Rose WN Maid nht rochelle.vpk (Rochelle skin) Only DOAXVV Marie Rose Whimsical Nyan Maid nht.vpk (all survivors) This skin works best on local servers and singleplayer.

Only DOAXVV Marie Rose Whimsical Nyan Maid nht (request) DEAD OR ALIVE Xtreme Venus Vacation (2017) Marie Rose - Whimsical Nyan Maid no heart tattoo Skin. Replaces all survivors L4D1(bill,francis,louis,zoey),L4D2 (nick,coach,ellis,rochelle) Skin. Zoey voice support works Credits: skin - iluda306 [DOAXVV Marie Rose - Whimsical Nyan Maid[DL] Rochelle 2] skin edit - l4dkk 9.vpk files are included in the compressed file. DOAXVV Marie Rose WN Maid nht bill.vpk (bill skin) DOAXVV Marie Rose WN Maid nht francis.vpk (francis skin) DOAXVV Marie Rose WN Maid nht Louis.vpk (Louis skin) DOAXVV Marie Rose WN Maid nht Zoey.vpk (zoey skin) DOAXVV Marie Rose WN Maid nht coach.vpk (coach skin) DOAXVV Marie Rose WN Maid nht elliss.vpk (ellis skin) DOAXVV Marie Rose WN Maid nht nick.vpk (nick skin) DOAXVV Marie Rose WN Maid nht rochelle.vpk (Rochelle skin) Only DOAXVV Marie Rose Whimsical Nyan Maid nht.vpk (all survivors) This skin works best on local servers and singleplayer.

item.title: [ Mod ] M4A1 URG-I (Military sniper)
item.description:
View Article
Media
Media gallery
1 / 8
M4A1 URG-I (Military sniper) URG-I (Upper Reciever Group-Improved) M4 rifles skin. Skin replacement for the Left 4 Dead 2 Heckler & Koch MSG90A1 (Military Sniper Rifle). scripts More hud icon Rate of Fire - 750RPM 30 bullets sound FIX skin - Animal33, Axeno [M4A1 URG-I (SG552)] Port and Compile - l4dkk

item.title: [ 5 Maps ] View of Hell
item.description:
View Article
Media
Media gallery
1 / 8
VIEW OF HELL CUSTOM CAMPAIGN Campaign description: The survivors had a helicopter accident and crashed into a deserted area. Initially, they were not far from the airport, but when they arrived, they were too late. Their only escape was a cruise ship. They had heard that someone there might be the only hope of salvation. Credits: I did this campaign solo. I started working on it in 2022, but with breaks. Of course, the custom pieces were taken from other games like No More Room in Hell, Black Mesa, and CS:GO, and the models were from a sidekick I haven't contacted in a while. This is my fourth campaign. I don't know if I've learned anything over the years, but I've added more stuff since the last one, like this unrelenting morning.
item.content:encoded:
View Article
Media
Media gallery
1 / 8
VIEW OF HELL CUSTOM CAMPAIGN Campaign description: The survivors had a helicopter accident and crashed into a deserted area. Initially, they were not far from the airport, but when they arrived, they were too late. Their only escape was a cruise ship. They had heard that someone there might be the only hope of salvation. Credits: I did this campaign solo. I started working on it in 2022, but with breaks. Of course, the custom pieces were taken from other games like No More Room in Hell, Black Mesa, and CS:GO, and the models were from a sidekick I haven't contacted in a while. This is my fourth campaign. I don't know if I've learned anything over the years, but I've added more stuff since the last one, like this unrelenting morning.
